This was the case for the previous update (Hotfix #72) and is the case for this update (Hotfix #73). The game started a few times for me on the previous update and then stopped working. After a patch it started working correctly again, I was able to launch it 2 or 3 times throughout several hours, but then after half a day it stopped working again. I tried different proton versions, GE and not GE, they all don't change anything. I'm not sure what is the cause of that. Verifying integrity of game files doesn't help either.
The online game server is always down. I also have this problem with Dead by Daylight and Hunt Showdown.
Crashes in "Connecting" window after starting the game

Since the latest season dropped (18/12/2024) all Linux support has now stopped working. The game will launch perfectly fine but once you get to the part where the game client has to connect to the Dark and Darker servers you will instantly crash to desktop.

I've tried every combination of proton version and launch commands I personally know. ProtonGE, Proton9,8,7 and so on. With and without launch commands. I've tried setting up a bottle but no luck.

Game is from the looks of it currently completely broken.

Previously I used GE-Proton 9.7 and it was all great, 30 hours of gameplay 0 issues. Now not a single proton version works. Tried versions from 7 to 9.21, but no luck. I tried proton experimental, but no luck.

Verifying file integrity didn't fix this issue as well.

Previous update broke the game, it was something related to audio issues. 
With Early Access Hotfix #74 the game is back and running again.
